prompt: Using the provided reference image, turn the cat into a realistic human portrait while keeping the same lounging pose, camera angle, framing, and the same plush turquoise chair background. Preserve the cat’s orange-and-white color pattern as inspiration for the human look: make the person a fair-skinned young woman with warm ginger hair and a soft, calm expression. Dress her in cozy off-white loungewear: 1 loose knit V-neck sweater and 1 pair of cream drawstring pants, seated naturally in the chair with relaxed body language. Make it photorealistic, soft natural indoor lighting, editorial lifestyle photo quality.
